Name: Tokopedia
Description: In April 2020, the Indonesian e-commerce giant Tokopedia suffered a massive data breach. The compromised data included user names, emails, and hashed passwords.

Name: LinkedIn
Description: LinkedIn suffered a data scrape that affected 700 million users. The data was posted for sale on a popular hacking forum.

Name: Bukalapak
Description: In early 2019, the Indonesian e-commerce site Bukalapak had its database breached by a Pakistani hacker known as Gnosticplayers.

Name: Adobe
Description: In October 2013, Adobe was breached, resulting in the theft of customer records including encrypted passwords and credit card information.

Name: Canva
Description: Graphic design platform Canva suffered a data breach in 2019, exposing the database containing emails and hashed passwords of millions of users.

Name: BSI (Bank Syariah Indonesia)
Description: Bank Syariah Indonesia suffered a ransomware attack by the LockBit gang, which allegedly stole 1.5TB of data including customer records and employee information.

Name: PDNS (Pusat Data Nasional Sementara)
Description: Serangan ransomware Brain Cipher pada Pusat Data Nasional Sementara (PDNS) 2 menyebabkan gangguan layanan publik masif di Indonesia, termasuk imigrasi.

Name: BKN (Badan Kepegawaian Negara)
Description: Kebocoran data 4,7 juta ASN Indonesia yang mencakup data pribadi sensitif, riwayat hidup, dan dokumen kepegawaian yang dijual di forum hacker.

Name: National Public Data (NPD)
Description: A massive leak containing billions of records including Social Security Numbers, names, and addresses from a US background check company.

Name: KPU (Komisi Pemilihan Umum)
Description: Data pemilih tetap (DPT) Pemilu 2024 diduga bocor dan dijual oleh hacker bernama Jimbo, mencakup NIK, nomor KK, dan alamat.

Name: BPJS Kesehatan
Description: Data 279 juta penduduk Indonesia yang dikelola BPJS Kesehatan bocor dan dijual di forum RaidForums, termasuk data gaji dan NIK.

Name: Facebook
Description: Data personal 533 juta pengguna Facebook dari 106 negara bocor secara online, mencakup nomor telepon dan ID pengguna.

Name: Yahoo
Description: Yahoo announced that all 3 billion of its user accounts were affected by a 2013 data breach, making it the largest in history.

Name: Marriott International
Description: The Starwood guest reservation database was compromised, exposing information for up to 500 million guests.

Name: Equifax
Description: A cybersecurity incident at Equifax impacted approximately 147 million U.S. consumers, exposing sensitive credit information.

Name: MyPertamina
Description: Bjorka mengklaim telah meretas data 44 juta pengguna aplikasi MyPertamina, mencakup nama, email, NIK, dan pengeluaran bahan bakar.

Name: PLN
Description: Data pelanggan PLN diduga bocor dan dijual di forum breached.to, mencakup nama pelanggan dan nomor meteran.

Name: Telkomsel (IndiHome)
Description: Data browsing history dan NIK pelanggan IndiHome diduga bocor dan dijual di forum online.

Name: Wattpad
Description: Wattpad suffered a data breach that exposed the personal information of 270 million users, which was later sold on public forums.

Name: Zynga
Description: The mobile game developer Zynga suffered a breach affecting players of Words with Friends and Draw Something.

Name: Change Healthcare
Description: A massive ransomware attack disrupted the US healthcare system and resulted in the theft of millions of patient records.

Name: Red Hat (GitLab)
Description: Crimson Collective exfiltrated 570GB of data from over 28,000 internal repositories, including sensitive configuration data.

Name: TransUnion
Description: Misconfigured API permissions allowed unauthorized access to millions of customer records through a third-party integration.

Name: Qantas
Description: Exfiltration of customer records following exploitation of a third-party system, affecting frequent-flyer members.

Name: Inafis (Polri)
Description: Data sidik jari dan informasi pribadi dari database Inafis Polri diduga bocor dan dijual di forum gelap.

Name: Jasa Marga
Description: Data internal PT Jasa Marga diduga bocor, mencakup data karyawan dan dokumen proyek.

Name: Bank Jatim
Description: Data nasabah Bank Jatim diduga bocor dan dijual di RaidForums, mencakup data saldo dan NIK.

Name: Pertamina Training & Consulting
Description: Data pribadi pelamar kerja di Pertamina PTC diduga bocor dan dipublikasikan secara online.

Name: Ditjen Pajak (DJP)
Description: Bjorka kembali berulah dengan membocorkan 6 juta data NPWP, termasuk milik Presiden Jokowi dan para menteri.

Name: MOAB (Mother of All Breaches)
Description: A super-leak containing 26 billion records from thousands of previous breaches and new leaks compiled in one place.
